title: Carved
description: A vanilla-friendly decoration and content mod surrounding 3 new types of trees designed with additional QOL features.
body:
![carved](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cf9c0d7e0d1a0dc21cf4d166ef79af89353896d.png)

This mod adds new trees with unique mechanics tied to each. These new trees look beautiful for decoration and also add many new features that all fit Vanilla+ to help expand and add content to your modpacks.

<details>
<summary>All Current Features</summary>

## Catagories

<details>
<summary>Woods</summary>

### Spirit Wood
- Obtained in Dark Oak biomes
- Mahoganyish coloured wood
- Spirit Leafs give 20 seconds of Regeneration when eaten
### Boreal Wood
- Obtained in Snowy Peak biomes
- Dark Brown coloured wood
- Boreal Berries give 10 seconds of Strength when eaten
### Picea Wood
- Obtained in Taiga biomes
- Birch-like coloured wood
- Picea Facicles can be used to make a new food, Jelly
### Half Stripped Wood
- Literally just logs that have been half stripped
- Crafted with 1 Normal Log and 1 Stripped Log
- Fully directional

</details>

<details>
<summary>Stones</summary>

### Marble
- Obtained underground with similiar spawn rates to Diorite
- Completely spawn-proof
- Craftable with Diorite and Calcite
### Dark Marble
- Obtained underground with similiar spawn rates to Tuff
- Completely blast proof and immue to most mob griefing
- Craftable with Deepslate and Tuff
### Variants
- Both Marble and Dark Marble have smooth and tile variants
- These variants keep the same traits as their basic versions
- Can all be made using a Stonecutter

</details>

<details>
<summary>Enchants</summary>

### Dual Strike - Greataxe
- Replaces your overcharge with a second sweep. Your sweeps no longer do any damage and have less knockback.

### Engulf - Greataxe
- Allows you to charge your Greataxe instead of using your sweep. Continuous use drains the bar over time, releasing applies the Amplified effect depending on time held.

### Amplified
- New Effect that boosts all forms of healing for the duration of the effect.
- Increases the effectiveness of Spirit Leaves.
- Obtainable from Engulf and Spirit Fruit Bowls.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Miscellaneous</summary>

### Jelly
- New Food made using Picea Facicles
- Has a slow eat rate, however is very replenishing
- Very easy to obtain and good for early-game

### Jelly Block
- Crafted with 4 Jelly
- Works as an alternative to slime and honey
- Does not stick to slime or honey.

### Picea Blowgun
- Crafted using Picea Wood
- Can shoot Picea Facicles, which slow enemies on hit.
- Cannot be used in the offhand

### Ancient Claw
- Found in Bastions
- Extends the building reach of a player when in offhand
- Also gives a small attack reach buff

### Spirit Greataxe
- New Weapon made using Spirit Materials and a Netherite Axe
- Will build up charge with a bar, using the ability will cause a sweep
- The sweep has high knockback and damage, these can be amplified by letting it build overcharge

</details>

</details>
